title: AKTU Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: AKTU Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: AKTU Date Sheet 2026 is out for Even Semester exams from 7 May to 6 June 2026. Students can check B.Tech, B.Pharm, MBA, MCA and other UG/PG exam schedules, subject-wise dates, and download the official PDF at aktu.ac.in.

content.text: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU) has officially released the AKTU Date Sheet 2026 for Even Semester examinations. The exams are scheduled to be conducted from May 07, 2026 to June 06, 2026. Students can download the official date sheet PDF from the university website at aktu.ac.in or through the direct link provided below.

The schedule covers various undergraduate and postgraduate programs including B.Tech, B.Pharm, MBA, MCA, and others for the 2025-26 session. Students are advised to check the detailed subject-wise timetable carefully.

sections.heading: Download the AKTU Date Sheet 2026 PDF here

content.text: Click Here to Download AKTU Even Semester Final Date Sheet 2026 PDF

links.text: Click Here to Download AKTU Even Semester Final Date Sheet 2026 PDF

content.text: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University has announced the complete AKTU Date Sheet 2026 for even semester exams. This schedule helps students plan their preparation effectively for the upcoming May-June examinations.

rows: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU)

sections.heading: How to Download AKTU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the AKTU Date Sheet 2026 from the official university portal. Following these simple steps will help you access the complete exam schedule quickly.

items: Visit the official AKTU website at aktu.ac.in.
Navigate to the Examination or Notice section on the homepage.
Look for the link titled "Even Semester Examination Schedule 2026" or similar notification.
Click on the relevant PDF link for your course and semester.
The date sheet will open in a new tab - review all details carefully.
Download and save the PDF file for future reference.
Take a printout if needed for better preparation planning.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in AKTU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official AKTU Date Sheet 2026 PDF contains essential information required for smooth examination conduction. Students should thoroughly review these details before the exams.

items: Exam dates and days for each subject
Paper codes and subject names
Timings of the examinations
Semester and course specifics
Regular and carry-over exam distinctions
Important instructions for students
Reporting time to the examination center
Any special notes or guidelines
